summary: Iteration 27 testing complete. Most features working correctly: Chart tool (Bar/Pie/Line with axes, labels, grid), DraggablePanel, PDF import tool, Highlighter tool, Templates (20 templates in 8 categories). CRITICAL BUG FOUND: Shapes with gradient not working - useGradient prop was missing from CanvasArea causing runtime error, fixed by adding useGradient prop but shapes still not rendering with gradient (stale closure issue suspected).

ui_bugs.issue: Shapes created with gradient mode enabled do not display gradient. The shape is created with white/transparent fill instead of gradient colors. useGradient prop was missing initially (fixed), but gradient still not being applied to shape element data.

action_items: FIX CRITICAL: Shape gradient feature broken. When gradient mode is enabled (useGradient=true) and gradient colors selected, shapes created on canvas do not show gradient. The shape element is created but gradientStart/gradientEnd are not being applied. Need to debug why the handleCanvasClick callback is not receiving updated gradient state values. Possible stale closure issue in useCallback.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: useGradient prop was missing from CanvasArea component props - added to both mobile and desktop CanvasArea calls in Editor.js
Fixed: useGradient was missing from handleCanvasClick useCallback dependency array in CanvasArea.js

Bug persists: Even after fixes, gradient is not being applied to newly created shapes. The shape element at line 336-337 checks (useGradient && gradientStart && gradientEnd) but this condition is not being satisfied when shapes are created.
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/components/editor/CanvasArea.js (added useGradient to props and useCallback deps)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 27 testing found one critical bug: Shape gradient not working. Steps to reproduce: 1) Open editor 2) Click color tool 3) Click any gradient preset (Fire/Sunset/etc) 4) Close color panel 5) Click circle tool 6) Click on canvas - circle appears but is white/transparent instead of gradient colors. The useGradient, gradientStart, gradientEnd values are set in parent Editor.js but not reaching handleCanvasClick in CanvasArea. All other features tested and working: Chart tool creates SVG charts with axes/grid/labels/legend, Templates panel shows 20 templates in 8 categories, DraggablePanel can be dragged, PDF import tool button present, Highlighter tool present.

features_tested.chart_tool_bar: PASSED - Bar chart creates SVG with Y-axis, X-axis, grid lines, value labels above bars, category labels below
features_tested.chart_tool_pie: PASSED - Pie chart creates SVG with percentage labels on slices, legend at bottom
features_tested.chart_tool_line: PASSED - Line chart creates SVG with axes, grid, area fill, data points (circles), value labels
features_tested.chart_empty_validation: PASSED - Alert shown 'Lütfen en az bir etiket ve veri girin' when trying to create chart with empty data
features_tested.shape_gradient: FAILED - Shapes created do not display gradient colors even when gradient mode is enabled
features_tested.draggable_panel: PASSED - Panels open and have drag handle, can be repositioned
features_tested.pdf_import_tool: PASSED - importpdf tool button present in toolbar with data-testid='tool-importpdf'
features_tested.highlighter_tool: PASSED - highlighter tool button present in toolbar with data-testid='tool-highlighter'
features_tested.highlighter_colors: PASSED - 6 highlighter color buttons in Word Type panel
features_tested.templates_panel: PASSED - 20 templates in 8 categories (Temel, İş, Kariyer, Hukuki, Eğitim, Kişisel, Pazarlama, Yaratıcı)
features_tested.template_cv: PASSED - CV template applies correctly with NAME, CONTACT, EXPERIENCE, EDUCATION, SKILLS sections

mocked_apis.pdf_import: PDF import uses pdfjs-dist client-side (not mocked)

reproduction_steps: 4. Verify checkbox is checked and gradient preview shows
7. Click on canvas to create shape
8. Shape appears white/transparent instead of gradient
rca_of_issue.root_cause: The handleCanvasClick useCallback in CanvasArea.js was not receiving updated gradient state. Initially useGradient prop was missing entirely. After fix, gradient values may still be stale due to React closure behavior.
fixes_applied: Added useGradient={useGradient} prop to both CanvasArea calls in Editor.js (lines 2845 and 3045)
Added useGradient to CanvasArea props destructuring (line 195)
Added useGradient to handleCanvasClick useCallback dependency array (line 381)
rca_of_issue.remaining_issue: Even after fixes, shapes are created without gradient. The condition (useGradient && gradientStart && gradientEnd) at line 337 appears to not be satisfied. Need to verify that gradient state updates are being received by CanvasArea component.
